structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-03 Water Quality Test Requirement Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-03 14:29:59-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Effective immediately, NOVA will no longer require a water quality test for FHA loans when an Individual Water Supply System (well) or Shared Well is present unless one of the following applies:

 

*	Subject property is new construction
*	Where an Appraiser has reported deficiencies with a well or the well water;
*	Where water is reported to be unsafe or known to be unsafe; or
*	Located in close proximity to dumps, landfills, industrial sites, farms (pesticides) or other sites that could contain hazardous wastes.

 

All other FHA requirements regarding Individual Water Supply Systems and Shared Wells still apply.  Please contact scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  with any questions.

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Production Operations <mailto:ProductionOperations@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
